required_inputs: validated SBS96/SBS288 mutation matrix plus reconstruction metrics and locked minimum-mutation policy
no_call_condition: No clinical SBS3 call when mutation count or reconstruction QC is below locked validation thresholds
output_contract: SBS3 activity and QC status with no-call reason
caveat: Current Phase 3 matrix plumbing exists but clinical SBS3 thresholds and known-answer validation are not locked

required_inputs: validated allele-specific copy-number segments with total/minor copy number purity and ploidy
no_call_condition: No scarHRD score when allele-specific segments or purity/ploidy are missing
output_contract: LOH LST TAI summed scar score and no-call reason
caveat: Current Phase 3 CNV bins are not allele-specific segments and must remain non-interpretable

required_inputs: validated somatic SNV/indel features plus production SV caller VCF or BEDPE and CNV context
no_call_condition: No CHORD class when production SV caller VCF or required mutation-context features are missing
output_contract: HRD class BRCA1-like probability BRCA2-like probability and no-call reason
caveat: Current Phase 3 SV evidence is BAM-derived evidence counts not a validated production SV caller VCF

required_inputs: locked six-feature HRD model inputs including substitution signatures indel signatures rearrangement signatures and CNV/LOH features
no_call_condition: No HRDetect-style score until every required feature class and model calibration is validated
output_contract: integrated HRD probability feature vector QC status and no-call reason
caveat: This is an interpretation boundary scaffold only; no clinical score should be emitted until model inputs and thresholds are validated
